description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBeige bag with knit texture and one main compartmentFold over flap in front with pleat and bow detailMagnetic button closureInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketOne zippered pocket at backOne long adjustable strapMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight:19cmWidth: 28cmDepth: 9cm
